title: Pediatrics - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pediatrics 56 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details A BODY OF WISDOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive medical care aimed at prevention and holistic treatment of acute and chronic conditions. Services include gynecological exams, well-child exams, general physical exams, nutrition and weight loss plans, testing and treatment for thyroid problems and allergies, diabetes support, cancer support, acupuncture treatment, and massage therapy. 119 NE 3rd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 665-9111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHILDREN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary pediatric care. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES WEST SALEM CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Provides urgent care clinic for current patients only. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a pediatric primary and specialty care to meet the needs of children and young adults. Primary services include neonatal and pediatric intensive care, cardiac surgery, organ and stem cell transplantation, and the treatment of cancer, heart disease, diabetes, kidney disease, metabolic disorders, and trauma. It is the major pediatric transplant center in Oregon, performing kidney, heart, cornea, and bone marrow transplants. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 0-22 Hours: Regular hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Emergency: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 346-0640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER EUGENE CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU Child Development and Rehabilitation Center provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in child development, feeding and swallowing disorders, pediatric psychology, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies and spina bifida.
